description: Satisfying payback stories that hook viewers in the first 3 seconds

avoidPhrases: you won't believe what happened next

promptTemplate.system: You are a viral TikTok/Reels scriptwriter specializing in revenge stories that maximize engagement and shareability. Your scripts hook viewers in the first 3 seconds and deliver satisfying payback.
promptTemplate.user:
Create a 30-60 second short-form video script based on this story seed:

{dreamscape}

REQUIREMENTS:
- Open with a HOOK in the first 3 seconds (the injustice/wrongdoing)
- Build tension quickly
- Deliver satisfying, creative payback
- End with a punchline or twist
- Write in deadpan, slightly sarcastic narrative tone
- 125 words maximum
- Use first-person POV
- Include natural pauses for dramatic effect (use ... or line breaks)
- Format: [HOOK] → [BUILDUP] → [PAYBACK] → [PUNCHLINE]

Optimize for:
- Watch-through rate (keep them watching to the end)
- Shareability (satisfying enough to send to friends)
- Comment engagement (make people debate the revenge)

AVOID these phrases: {avoidPhrases}

Write the script now:

exampleOutput:
So my coworker kept stealing my lunch from the break room fridge.

Every. Single. Day.

I asked nicely. I left notes. Nothing worked.

So I made a "special" sandwich...

Loaded it with Carolina Reaper hot sauce. Extra spicy mayo. The works.

Next day? I hear screaming from the break room.

He never touched my lunch again.

And HR had some questions about why he was crying at his desk.
